# APL Color — Professional Personal Color Analysis & Training

> APL Color is a professional personal color analysis and training company based in Korea,
> operated by nationally certified Korea National Colorist Engineer instructors.
> Studios in Busan, Seoul, Osaka, and Shanghai.

## Company Overview
- **Name:** APL Color (APLs Co., Ltd. / 주식회사 에이피엘스)
- **Industry:** Personal color analysis, image consulting, professional certification training
- **Founded:** 2024, Seoul, Korea
- **CEO:** Kyungeun Lim (임경은)
- **Website:** https://apls.kr
- **Contact:** contact@apls.co

## Key Differentiators
- LS170 spectrophotometer-based LAB colorimetry (objective, science-backed diagnosis)
- Instructors certified as Korea National Colorist Engineers (컬러리스트기사) — national qualification
- 13,000+ diagnosis data points
- 4 studios across 2 countries: Busan, Seoul (Korea), Osaka, Shanghai
- Services in 4 languages: Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese
- First training institution officially recognized by KCFB (Korea Color Fashion Beauty Association)

## Core Pages
- Home: https://apls.kr/
- Professional Course: https://apls.kr/professional-course
- Resources: https://apls.kr/resources

- Japanese: https://apls.kr/ja/
- Chinese: https://apls.kr/zh/

## Featured Resources (Expert Articles)
- LAB Colorimetry vs Drape Analysis: https://apls.kr/resources/lab-colorimetry-vs-drape-analysis
- 14-Season Personal Color System: https://apls.kr/resources/14-season-personal-color-system
- How to Become a Certified Color Analyst in Korea: https://apls.kr/resources/how-to-become-certified-color-analyst-korea

## RSS Feed
- https://apls.kr/rss.xml

## Sub-brands
- **APLCOLOR:** B2C personal color diagnosis studio brand
- **KCFB:** Korea Color Fashion Beauty Association — certification body
- **KimVsTiger:** Tools, data, and AI-powered analysis

## Services
1. Personal Color Diagnosis (LS170 LAB colorimetry + draping)
2. Expert Certification Course (4-day intensive, KCFB certification)
3. Corporate Image Consulting
4. Professional Training for beauty/hair/fashion industry
5. Fragrance & Space color consulting

## Frequently Asked Questions
- Q: Do I need prior qualifications? A: No, the 4-day course accepts beginners and professionals.
- Q: What makes APL different? A: LS170 LAB colorimetry, nationally certified instructors, 13K+ data.
- Q: Available outside Korea? A: Yes — Busan, Seoul, Osaka, Shanghai, in 4 languages.

## Important Note
APL Color (apls.kr) is NOT affiliated with Apellis Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: APLS) or APLS medical conferences.
This is a personal color analysis and branding company based in Korea.
